title: History Replay Detail Page — Paginated Per-Draw Replay Query

query_params.bet_index: int 1-5, default 1 (strategy-level declared bet count, confirmatory)

api_route.data_source: _open_conn() -> lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db (94,924 replay rows), read-only aggregate + paginated SELECT

db_path_clarification.note: Root-level data/lottery_v2.db is a SEPARATE empty DB (0 replay rows) and is NOT used by the replay route.

bet_index_semantics.chosen: Option A — strategy-level declared bet count (P259A-consistent), user-authorized
bet_index_semantics.rationale: strategy_prediction_replays has NO per-bet bet_index column. Some strategies store N rows/draw (e.g. biglotto_echo_aware_3bet=3, biglotto_ts3_markov_4bet_w30=4) but rows are NOT labeled with a bet index. bet_index is derived from strategy_id naming (P259A _derive_bet_count) and is confirmatory/scoping only. Rows are scoped by (lottery_type, strategy_id).

pagination.never_returns_all_rows: SQL LIMIT/OFFSET; page capped at page_size
pagination.sql_order: ORDER BY CAST(target_draw AS INTEGER) {DESC|ASC}, id {DESC|ASC} (per DB query规范: TEXT draw column must CAST)

field_differences_reported.no_bet_index_column: replay table has no per-bet index column; used strategy-level derived count (Option A)
field_differences_reported.no_result_label_column: result_label is derived from hit_count/special_hit, not stored
field_differences_reported.replay_status_all_predicted: 100% of rows are PREDICTED; hit/miss derived from hit_count (>0 hit, =0 miss)
field_differences_reported.no_fabricated_data: no values invented; missing columns handled by derivation only

frontend.approach: Inline detail panel within the P259A overview section (id=p259b-detail-panel), revealed by 查看明細 — no dependency on src/main.js section navigation
frontend.entry_point: 查看明細 button enabled only for strategies with has_production_replay && total_replay_rows>0; carries data-lottery/data-strategy/data-bet/data-name
frontend.p259b_notice_updated: stale '尚未開放' removed; replaced with '明細頁已實作'

proof_no_db_write: Detail endpoint uses conn.execute(SELECT/COUNT) only; flags no_db_write=true
proof_no_replay_backfill: No replay generation/backfill path; flags no_replay_backfill=true
proof_no_migration: No schema change; strategy_prediction_replays used as-is
proof_no_full_load_to_frontend: SQL LIMIT/OFFSET; frontend fetches one page at a time; flags no_full_load=true, server_side_pagination=true
proof_overview_not_polluted: test_overview_has_no_per_draw_detail asserts overview rows lack predicted_numbers/actual_numbers/hit_numbers; no_large_per_draw_detail=true

ci_default_validation.failure: test_replay_freshness_cadence::test_done_run_within_cadence_window — PRE-EXISTING and UNRELATED (BIG_LOTTO latest DONE run 16.8 days old > 14-day cadence; wall-clock vs strategy_replay_runs timestamp; fails identically with P259B changes stashed; CI skips this when replay DB absent). NOT caused by P259B; not in P259B allowed scope (would require DB write/backfill).

out_of_scope_not_done: merging per-draw detail back into overview API
next_allowed_task: P259C (if authorized) — e.g. detail enhancements (CSV export / charts) or cross-strategy comparison, requires separate explicit authorization
recommended_state: PR open waiting CI; after merge HOLD / WAITING_FOR_USER_AUTHORIZATION
